zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Wotton I於1224年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾華亞頓時，他的父親Richard de Whatton33歲，母親Margaret de Mandeville-59歲。他於1241年與Ela Bisset在英國英格蘭素瑞沃頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1300年4月1日在他的家鄉享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Wotton I于1224年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾華亞頓时，他的父亲Richard de Whatton33岁，母亲Margaret de Mandeville-59岁。他于1241年与Ela Bisset在英国英格兰素瑞沃頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1300年4月1日在他的家乡享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wooten
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English wid(u), wudu ‘wood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Wootton in Northamptonshire or Oxfordshire, Wootton Bassett in Wiltshire, Wotton in Surrey, and Wotton under Edge in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Wotton I was born in 1224, in Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Richard de Whatton, was 33 and his mother, Margaret de Mandeville, was -59. He married Ela Bisset in 1241, in Wotton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 1 April 1300, in his hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Wotton I est né en 1224, à Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Whatton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Mandeville, avait -59 ans. Il a épousé Ela Bisset en 1241, à Wotton, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1300, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Wotton I 1224 in Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Whatton 33 und seine Mutter Margaret de Mandeville -59. Er hat 1241 in Wotton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Ela Bisset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 1. April 1300 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Wotton I è nato il nel 1224 nel Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Whatton, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Mandeville, aveva -59 anni. Lui sposato Ela Bisset nel 1241, nel Wotton, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 aprile 1300, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Wotton Iが1224年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウアットオンで生まれた時，父Richard de Whattonは33歳，母Margaret de Mandevilleは-59歳であった。1241年にイギリスイギリススリーウオットオンでEla Bissetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1300年4月1日に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Wotton I(이)가 1224년 영국 노틴그함실르 화엇에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Whatton(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Mandeville(은)는 -59세였다. 그는 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 보턴에서 Ela Bisset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1300년 4월 1일 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Wotton I nasceu em 1224, em Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Whatton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Mandeville, tinha -59 anos. Ele casou-se com Ela Bisset em 1241, em Wotton, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de abril de 1300, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Wotton I родился в 1224 г. в местности уаттон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Whatton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Mandeville, -59. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela Bisset в 1241 г. в местности воттон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 апреля 1300 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Wotton I nació en 1224, en Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Whatton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret de Mandeville, tenía -59 años. Se casó con Ela Bisset en 1241, en Wotton, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de abril de 1300, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años.
